mano_cua.result_summary: Google Fonts通过media=print+onload异步加载（FOUT），导致页面先显示系统默认字体再切换为Roboto/Lato。源码确认字体CSS使用非阻塞方式加载，字体闪烁机制明确存在
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The page exhibits font flickering (FOUT - Flash of Unstyled Text) due to the asynchronous Google Fonts loading method used (media=print + onload technique). The source code clearly shows Google Fonts (Roboto and Lato) are loaded non-blocking, which causes text to initially appear in system default fonts and then switch to Google Fonts after the CSS downloads.
